name: maxtac-cloud
description: AWS, Azure, and GCP vulnerability research workflows for MaxTAC.

interface.shortDescription: AWS, Azure, and GCP cloud vulnerability research.
interface.longDescription: MaxTAC for Cloud adds AWS, Azure, and GCP surface triage, IAM boundary research, cloud data exposure workflows, runtime metadata and workload-identity boundary analysis, and cloud-specific auditor routing.
defaultPrompt: Use MaxTAC for Cloud to map this AWS, Azure, or GCP attack surface.
Use MaxTAC for Cloud to evaluate this cloud IAM or workload-identity boundary.
Use MaxTAC for Cloud to prepare a non-destructive proof packet for this cloud vulnerability.
